name: Insert Jump Removal Before Filter
intent: Protect event detection from large baseline steps that should be removed before waveform conditioning.
expected_information_flow_effect: Adds a waveform-preserving cleanup stage before the filter without changing the downstream family boundary.

audit.rationale: Large signal jumps can dominate detector thresholds and erase downstream event support if they are not removed first.
audit.dejargonized_summary: If the raw trace has big step jumps, remove those jumps before the main filter so the detector still sees real events.
uncertainty_notes: The runtime still depends on legacy topology matching, so boundary-only graphs may not admit the rewrite yet.

references.title: Signal event rate refinement inventory
references.citation: Local transitional family refinement asset for jump removal.
